case_title: ROEHL, MICHAEL et al vs. MARTINEZ, RUDOLFO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-04-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC ON PLTF'S ATTY DENNIS CUNNINGHAM. HEARING SET FOR AUG-13-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-13-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-13-1997, TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY DENNIS CUNNINGHAM., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-28-1997 CONTINUED FROM AUG-13-1997 TO SEP-24-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROEHL, MICHAEL ROEHL, CATHERINE MARSH
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROEHL, MICHAEL ROEHL, CATHERINE MARSH SERVED SEP-15-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, RUDOLFO
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-02-1996, CONTINUED TO DEC-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROEHL, MICHAEL ROEHL, CATHERINE MARSH
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROEHL, MICHAEL ROEHL, CATHERINE MARSH UNSERVED ON DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, RUDOLFO

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-20-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED FROM 12/20/96 AS AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT. PLTT. TO NOTIFY DEFT. HEARING SET FOR JAN-23-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-24-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST ALL DEFT. PREVIOUS SANCTIONS $200.00 IS VACATED. HEARING SET FOR NOV-19-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-19-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY DENNIS CUNNINGHAM. HEARING SET FOR JAN-14-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, RUDOLFO
DECLARATION OF CATHERIN MARSH ROEHL FILED (AMENDED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROEHL, MICHAEL ROEHL, CATHERINE MARSH

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROEHL, MICHAEL ROEHL, CATHERINE MARSH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, RUDOLFO $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,000.00

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROEHL, MICHAEL ROEHL, CATHERINE MARSH AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, RUDOLFO DOES 1 - 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-02-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-01-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-12-1996

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROEHL, MICHAEL ROEHL, CATHERINE MARSH ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
